title: Monodex Crawl Config
description: Crawl configuration for monodex - defines which files to index and how to chunk them

version.description: Config schema version (currently only 1 is supported)

fileTypes.description: Maps file extensions to chunking strategies

patternsToExclude.description: Glob patterns for paths to exclude from indexing

items.description: Glob pattern (supports ** for recursive, * for wildcard)

patternsToKeep.description: Glob patterns that override exclusions (useful for keeping test files in src/)

items.description: Glob pattern (supports ** for recursive, * for wildcard)
